steps.title: Identify similar triangles
steps.content: The marked angles at $W$ and $Y$ are equal. The angles at $Q$ are vertical angles, so they are equal too. By angle-angle similarity, triangles WQX and YQZ are similar.

steps.title: Use corresponding sides
steps.content:
Corresponding sides in similar triangles have the same ratio.
$$\frac{70}{YZ}=\frac{90}{36}=\frac{5}{2}$$
Solve for $YZ$.
$$5YZ=140$$
$$YZ=28$$
The answer is A.
